---
title: "Home Dash"
---

```{ojs data_streame_toggle}
// Setup libraries
d3 = require('d3')

viewof streamActive = Inputs.toggle({ label: "Toggle Stream", value: false })

// save each new value to lastBtc 
// avoids circular reference in btc and saves last value on display
mutable lastBtc = "Press Toggle Stream to begin"
```


```{ojs}
// weather_raw = await d3.json(
//   "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=35.23&longitude=-80.84&temperature_unit=fahrenheit&current=temperature_2m,cloud_cover&hourly=temperature_2m,cloud_cover&forecast_days=1"
// )

weather_raw = Generators.observe((notify) => {
  
  const fetchWeather = async () => {
    const data = await d3.json(
      "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=35.23&longitude=-80.84&temperature_unit=fahrenheit&current=temperature_2m,cloud_cover&hourly=temperature_2m,cloud_cover&forecast_days=1"
    );
    notify(data);
  };

  // Fetch immediately on load
  fetchWeather();

  // Then fetch every 15 minutes
  const interval = setInterval(fetchWeather, 15 * 60 * 1000);

  // Cleanup when cell is invalidated
  return () => clearInterval(interval);
})
```

<!-- ::: {layout="[ [1, 1] , []]"} -->

<div class="grid-cols-2">
<div class="card">

```{ojs}
// weather_raw.current
weather_raw.current.temperature_2m
```

</div>
<div class="card">

```{ojs}
weather_raw.hourly
```

</div>
</div>

<!-- ::: -->
